fields.label: API Key
fields.helpText: From Google AI Studio (aistudio.google.com) -> Get API Key

fields.label: Model
fields.helpText: Gemini 3 Flash Preview is the latest. 2.5 Flash has a generous free tier (1,500 req/day). 2.5 Pro is the most accurate. 1.5 Pro kept for long-context workloads.

healthcheck_config.description: Lists available Gemini models to validate the API key

metadata.summary: Google Gemini text and chat API for general-purpose generation, multi-turn conversations, embeddings, and token counting. Use this for second-opinion LLMs, cross-family consensus, and tasks where a non-Anthropic model helps (e.g. design-direction brainstorming, copywriting refreshes).
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Go to aistudio.google.com
2. Click 'Get API Key' in the top-right
3. Create a new API key (or use an existing one)
4. Copy the key and paste it here

Free tier: 1,500 requests/day on Gemini 2.5 Flash. Pro models are paid beyond a small daily allowance.
